FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritTeplotu: Measures temperature using the DS18B20 sensor.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritTeplotuAGraf: Measures temperature and sends data to serial port for graphing.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritSilu: Measures force using the HX711 load cell amplifier. Uses a median filter.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritSiluAGraf: Measures force and sends data to serial port for graphing.
FyzikalniSenzory.tarovatSilomer: Zeros the force meter (tare). Call this before measuring.
FyzikalniSenzory.nastavitMeritko: Calibrates the force meter scale factor.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritVzdalenost: Measures distance using the HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritVzdalenostAGraf: Measures distance and sends data to serial port for graphing.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritRychlost: Calculates speed from consecutive distance measurements.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritRychlostAGraf: Calculates speed and sends data to serial port for graphing.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritTlak: Measures pressure using the HX710B sensor.
FyzikalniSenzory.zmeritTlakAGraf: Measures pressure and sends data to serial port for graphing.
FyzikalniSenzory.tarovatTlakomer: Zeros the pressure gauge (tare). Call this before measuring.
FyzikalniSenzory.nastavitMeritkoTlaku: Calibrates the pressure gauge scale factor.
